---
name: "User Story"
about: "Create a MyValidCV Agile user story"
title: "User Story: "
labels: ["user story"]
assignees: ""
---

## User Story

As a **[type of user]**  
I want **[goal or action]**  
So that **[benefit or relief]**

## User Experience Reason

What user pain, confusion, anxiety or delay does this remove?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The expected user can complete the action.
- [ ] The wrong user/account type cannot access restricted data.
- [ ] The page is readable on mobile and desktop.
- [ ] The happy path and one failure path are tested.

## MoSCoW Priority

Choose one label after creating the issue:

- Must Have
- Should Have
- Could Have
- Won't Have

## Story Points

Suggested Fibonacci estimate:

- 1: very small
- 2: small
- 3: medium
- 5: large
- 8: very large
- 13: too large, split it

Story points: **[1, 2, 3, 5, 8, or 13]**

## Sprint

Sprint: **[Sprint 1, Sprint 2, Sprint 3, or Backlog]**

## Test Notes

- [ ] Local check completed.
- [ ] Heroku check completed.
- [ ] Browser/UX smoke test completed.
